# MAA Roguelike template assets

These PNG templates are selected assets from MaaAssistantArknights.

- Source project: https://github.com/MaaAssistantArknights/MaaAssistantArknights
- Source branch: `dev-v2`
- Source directory: `resource/template/Roguelike/base`
- License: AGPL-3.0-only

They are used for MAA-style template matching in RHODES OBS COMMANDER3373 recognition profiles.
